data.title: Video: Iranian Propaganda vs. U.S. Talking Points: How We Determined the Real Damage to U.S. Military Bases
data.description: Amid the barrage of messages and misinformation swirling online and on Capitol Hill, about what damage U.S. military sites incurred during the conflict with Iran, a Times analysis of satellite imagery shows 18 sites in seven countries were hit.
data.keywords: Military Bases,US and Israeli Attack on Iran,War;Armed Conflicts,Military,United States Central Command,Iran,Iraq,Israel,Jordan,Middle East,your-feed-visual-investigations
